curation_notes: The vulnerability is CVE-2019-18197 in libxslt 1.1.33, which Nokogiri vendors as a native dependency. The fix in the Nokogiri repo (commit 43a17533) updates the vendored libxslt from 1.1.33 to 1.1.34 in dependencies.yml. The upstream libxslt fix (commit 22324737 on GNOME/libxslt) adds a single line resetting ctxt->lasttext to NULL in the xsltCopyText function in transform.c. The actual C source code of libxslt is not committed to the Nokogiri repo — it is downloaded at build time based on the version specified in dependencies.yml. Location is therefore dependencies.yml where the vulnerable version is pinned. Pre-assigned class use-after-free is correct per CWE-416 and the advisory description of a dangling pointer leading to memory reuse.
